name: nocion
description: Andrej Karpathy-inspired LLM Wiki in VS Code Chat.

chatParticipants.name: nocion
chatParticipants.description: Ask and maintain your personal wiki

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create a wiki with a name, optional location, and optional domain.

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Add knowledge from a file, URL, Jira issue, Confluence page, JQL query, or pasted text.

commands.name: query
commands.description: Ask a question and synthesize an answer from the active or targeted wiki.

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Check links, orphan pages, missing index entries, empty pages, and optional semantic issues.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show page counts, wikilinks, recent operations, and wiki location.

commands.name: switch
commands.description: List discovered wikis or set the active wiki for this chat session.

commands.name: all
commands.description: Ask one question across every registered wiki.

disambiguation.description: The user wants to initialize, ingest into, maintain, or query a persistent personal markdown wiki.
examples: What does my research wiki say about transformers?
Ingest this article into my wiki
Find contradictions in my personal knowledge base
